mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_report (board_reportno, boardno, memberno, reason) VALUES (board_report_seq.nextval, #{boardno}, #{memberno}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT board_reportno, boardno, memberno, reason, rdate FROM board_report ORDER BY board_reportno DESC

SELECT br.boardno, COUNT(*) AS report_count, b.title, m.id AS id, m.nickname AS nickname, m.memberno AS memberno FROM board_report br JOIN board b ON br.boardno = b.boardno JOIN member m ON b.memberno = m.memberno GROUP BY br.boardno, b.title, m.id, m.nickname, m.memberno ORDER BY report_count DESC

SELECT br.board_reportno AS "boardReportno", br.memberno AS "memberno", br.reason AS "reason", TO_CHAR(br.rdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "rdate", m.id AS "reporterId", m.nickname AS "reporterNickname" FROM board_report br JOIN member m ON br.memberno = m.memberno WHERE br.boardno = #{boardno}
